mapper.select:
select * from employee
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into employee(name, phone, email, department, position, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values(#{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{department}, #{position}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
